name: nanothrones
description: Great Houses vie for the Iron Throne. Betrayal, marriage, assassination. Who sits the throne at year 100?
theme: medieval political intrigue, dark fantasy, Game of Thrones
opening_events: The old king is dead. The Iron Throne sits empty. The Great Houses gather their forces.
Ravens carry word across the realm: a new age of blood and ambition has begun.
Winter whispers from the North. The realm is fractured. Alliances shift like sand.

agents.name: Cersei
agents.goal: seize the Iron Throne and destroy all rivals

agents.name: Tyrion
agents.goal: survive through wit and become indispensable

agents.name: Daenerys
agents.goal: reclaim what is rightfully mine and rule justly

agents.name: Jon
agents.goal: protect the realm from the true threat

agents.name: Varys
agents.goal: serve the realm by controlling information

agents.name: Littlefinger
agents.goal: climb the ladder of chaos to ultimate power

agents.name: Jaime
agents.goal: redeem my honor and protect those I love

agents.name: Arya
agents.goal: avenge my family and become no one

agents.name: Sansa
agents.goal: survive, learn, and rule the North

agents.name: Margaery
agents.goal: become queen through charm and alliance

agents.name: Stannis
agents.goal: claim the throne by right of law

agents.name: Melisandre
agents.goal: guide the chosen one to victory through faith

agents.name: Brienne
agents.goal: fulfill my oath and protect the innocent
